text:
"God's Gift" is a song from the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. It is track 18 in the album Music from Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/35707 It is also used on the video (Making of ) evangelion: Another Impact. 

It plays at the finale of the film when Mari in Unit-08 ejects Shinji from Evangelion 13 and averts the Fourth Impact.

Lyrics

 
From the black of space I will create
earth and in my image incarnate
heaven is to be a place of rest
earth is for the people I will test

Six days have passed
on the seventh I will render myself to a day of rest and to contemplate what is to be
Mankind begins its fateful journey faced by trials and tribulations, war and peace
Of my presence to this end my work is done

this world I give, for you to live
blessed are the ones that can live in peace

Forever
